title: Placement by the Administration - Recruitment and Placement through the Administration
content:
Section 1. Hiring through the Administration. The Administration shall recruit and place workers primarily on government-to-government arrangements and shall service the hiring of foreign government instrumentalities. It shall also recruit and place workers for foreign employers in sectors as the policy may dictate. The Administration shall administer programs supporting employment development objectives; set parameters for servicing foreign clients; and coordinate with POEA Regional Centers, Department of Labor and Employment Regional Offices, and local government units to organize recruitment activities in provinces to aid government employment dispersal efforts.

Section 2. Recruitment and Placement of Workers. All employers, government or private, hiring through the Administration shall undertake recruitment and placement through the Administration's facilities. Activities include interview selection; referral to medical examination; contract processing; assistance in securing passports and visas; pre-employment and pre-departure orientation; and travel arrangements.

Section 3. Foreign Employer's Guarantee Trust Fund. A Guarantee Trust Fund shall be established for all workers hired on government-to-government arrangements to cover monetary claims arising from breach of contractual obligations.
